query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A person stands facing a tall arched stained glass window, appearing as a dark shape against bright exterior light. The individual holds an object at waist level. The window features a geometric grid of leaded panes with textured glass in warm amber and clear tones, surmounted by a semicircular transom and a central circular medallion with colored details depicting a crest or portrait. Daylight streams through the intricate patterns while the interior foreground remains dark.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person stands as a deliberate silhouette with crushed shadows and extreme underexposure against a tall arched stained glass window, reducing the figure to a graphic black form devoid of visible features or texture. The individual holds an object at waist level. The window behind them contains a geometric grid of leaded panes with textured glass in warm amber and clear tones, topped by a semicircular transom and a central circular medallion with colored crest or portrait details. The exposure extremes create stark abstraction through the blown-out backlight and impenetrable shadow.
